---
title: "predictions"
author: "Michael Anderson, Eric Feczko"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false


library(arrow)
library(cifti)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsci)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(nlme)
library(plotrix)
library(pls)
library(reshape2)
library(RSpectra)
library(tidyr)

```

## Functions

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

align_df_to_ids <- function(df, ids, id_col = "id") {
  ids <- as.character(ids)
  df[[id_col]] <- as.character(df[[id_col]])

  missing <- setdiff(ids, df[[id_col]])
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "[FATAL] %d ids not present in df$%s. Examples: %s",
      length(missing), id_col, paste(head(missing, 10), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  df2 <- df %>% slice(match(ids, .data[[id_col]]))

  if (!identical(df2[[id_col]], ids)) {
    stop("[FATAL] align_df_to_ids(): id alignment failed.")
  }
  df2
}

align_rows_to_ids <- function(X, ids) {
  ids <- as.character(ids)
  rn <- rownames(X)

  if (is.null(rn)) stop("[FATAL] align_rows_to_ids(): X has NULL rownames.")
  rn <- as.character(rn)

  missing <- setdiff(ids, rn)
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "[FATAL] %d ids not present in rownames(X). Examples: %s",
      length(missing), paste(head(missing, 10), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  X2 <- X[match(ids, rn), , drop = FALSE]

  if (!identical(rownames(X2), ids)) {
    stop("[FATAL] align_rows_to_ids(): rowname alignment failed.")
  }
  X2
}

CheckCIFTI <- function(pconndir,pconn) {
  pconnpath <- paste(pconndir,"/",pconn,sep="")
  ciftidata <- read_cifti(pconnpath)
  cmat <- ciftidata$data
  cmat_nans <- sum(is.na(cmat))
  outputdf <- data.frame(pconn_name = pconn, number_nans = cmat_nans)
  return(outputdf)
}

CommunityGridInfo <- function(community_df) {
  communities <- unique(community_df$comm)
  t(sapply(communities,function(x) {c(x,min(community_df$index[community_df$comm==x]),max(community_df$index[community_df$comm==x]))}))
}

extract_sub_id <- function(paths) sub(".*/sub-([^/]+)/.*", "\\1", paths)

FCMap <- function(cmat,plottitle='Correlation Matrix',negmax=-0.5,posmax=1,xlabel="ROI",ylabel="ROI",commcolor='black',comms_df) {
  cmat_nanzero <- cmat
  cmat_nanzero[is.na(cmat_nanzero)] <- 0
  cmat_long <- melt(cmat_nanzero)
  ggplot(cmat_long, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
    geom_raster() +
    geom_hline(yintercept=comms_df$comm_min,color = commcolor) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=comms_df$comm_max,color = commcolor) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=comms_df$comm_min,color = commcolor) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=comms_df$comm_max,color = commcolor) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks=round((comms_df$comm_min + comms_df$comm_max)/2),labels=comms_df$labels) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks=round((comms_df$comm_min + comms_df$comm_max)/2),labels=comms_df$labels) +
    scale_fill_gsea(limits = c(negmax,posmax)) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, vjust=.5, hjust=1)) +
    labs(title = plottitle, x = xlabel, y = ylabel)
}

make_p <- function(phenos, session, ids) {
  out <- phenos %>%
    filter(session_id == session) %>%
    select(-session_id) %>%
    mutate(id = sub("^sub-", "", participant_id)) %>%
    filter(id %in% ids) %>%
    select(-participant_id)

  # enforce unique id rows (if duplicates exist, you must resolve upstream)
  if (anyDuplicated(out$id)) {
    dup <- out$id[duplicated(out$id)]
    stop(sprintf(
      "[FATAL] Duplicated IDs in phenos for session %s. Examples: %s",
      session, paste(head(unique(dup), 10), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  out
}

make_X <- function(paths) {
  ids <- extract_sub_id(paths)

  X <- do.call(rbind, lapply(paths, pconnFunc))
  rownames(X) <- ids

  # sanity checks
  stopifnot(nrow(X) == length(ids))
  stopifnot(identical(rownames(X), ids))

  X
}

ManPlot <- function(V,
                    predictor.names = NULL,
                    group.structure = NULL,
                    specific.groups = NULL,
                    exclude.groups = NULL,
                    man.thresh = 0,
                    special.colors = NULL,
                    optional.index = NULL,
                    point.size = 1.5,
                    out.prefix = "Manhattan_Vector",
                    out.dir = ".",
                    width = 1600,
                    height = 900,
                    dpi = 200) {

  # ---- checks ----
  V <- as.matrix(V)
  p <- nrow(V)
  nvec <- ncol(V)

  if (is.null(predictor.names)) predictor.names <- paste0("X", seq_len(p))
  if (length(predictor.names) != p) stop("predictor.names must have length p (= nrow(V)).")

  if (is.null(group.structure)) group.structure <- rep("group1", p)
  if (length(group.structure) != p) stop("group.structure must have length p (= nrow(V)).")

  # ---- index handling (FIXED) ----
  if (is.null(optional.index)) {
    index <- seq_len(p)
  } else {
    if (length(optional.index) != p) stop("Specify same number of indices as predictors (length p).")
    index <- optional.index
  }

  # ---- colors ----
  dfcolor <- NULL
  if (!is.null(special.colors)) {
    # Expect special.colors as a 2-col object: group, color
    dfcolor <- as.data.frame(special.colors, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    if (ncol(dfcolor) != 2) stop("special.colors must have 2 columns: group, color.")
    colnames(dfcolor) <- c("group", "color")
    dfcolor$group <- as.factor(dfcolor$group)
  }

  # ---- requires ----
  if (!requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)) stop("Please install 'dplyr'.")
  if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) stop("Please install 'ggplot2'.")
  if (!requireNamespace("ggtext", quietly = TRUE)) stop("Please install 'ggtext'.")
  if (!requireNamespace("forcats", quietly = TRUE)) stop("Please install 'forcats'.")

  # ---- iterate vectors ----
  for (i in seq_len(nvec)) {

    df <- data.frame(
      pred  = predictor.names,
      group = as.factor(group.structure),
      index = index,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # subset groups if requested
    if (!is.null(specific.groups)) df <- dplyr::filter(df, group %in% specific.groups)
    if (!is.null(exclude.groups))  df <- dplyr::filter(df, !group %in% exclude.groups)

    # keep colors aligned to filtered groups
    dfcolor_i <- dfcolor
    if (!is.null(dfcolor_i)) {
      if (!is.null(specific.groups)) dfcolor_i <- dplyr::filter(dfcolor_i, group %in% specific.groups)
      if (!is.null(exclude.groups))  dfcolor_i <- dplyr::filter(dfcolor_i, !group %in% exclude.groups)
    }

    # values
    df$V <- abs(V[, i])

    # order within group by index, then build cumulative x-axis
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(index, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(newindx = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()

    df2 <- df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(max_idx = max(newindx), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(idx_add = dplyr::lag(cumsum(max_idx), default = 0)) %>%
      dplyr::select(group, idx_add)

    plot_data <- df %>%
      dplyr::inner_join(df2, by = "group") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(idx_cum = newindx + idx_add)

    # default colors if none supplied
    if (is.null(dfcolor_i)) {
      # alternating two colors
      groups <- levels(plot_data$group)
      dfcolor_i <- data.frame(
        group = factor(groups, levels = groups),
        color = rep(c("#276FBF", "#183059"), length.out = length(groups)),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      # ensure all groups present
      dfcolor_i$group <- factor(dfcolor_i$group)
      # If user omitted some groups, fill with alternating defaults
      missing_groups <- setdiff(levels(plot_data$group), as.character(dfcolor_i$group))
      if (length(missing_groups) > 0) {
        add <- data.frame(
          group = factor(missing_groups, levels = levels(plot_data$group)),
          color = rep(c("#276FBF", "#183059"), length.out = length(missing_groups)),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        dfcolor_i <- dplyr::bind_rows(dfcolor_i, add)
      }
      # align factor levels
      dfcolor_i$group <- factor(dfcolor_i$group, levels = levels(plot_data$group))
    }

    axis_set <- plot_data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(center = mean(idx_cum), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(dfcolor_i, by = "group")

    ylim <- 1.2 * max(plot_data$V, na.rm = TRUE)

    gg_plot_title <- paste0("Manhattan Vector ", i)  # (FIXED)

    manhplot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      data = plot_data,
      mapping = ggplot2::aes(x = idx_cum, y = V, color = forcats::as_factor(group))
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(alpha = 0.75, size = point.size) +
      ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(label = axis_set$group, breaks = axis_set$center) +
      ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, ylim)) +
      ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = axis_set$color) +
      ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = "Absolute Value \nEigenvector \nLoadings") +
      ggplot2::ggtitle(gg_plot_title) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
      ggplot2::theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(),
        axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 60, size = 6, vjust = 0.5)
      )

    if (man.thresh > 0) {
      manhplot <- manhplot +
        ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = man.thresh, color = "red", linetype = "solid")
    }

    # ---- save ----
    if (!dir.exists(out.dir)) dir.create(out.dir, recursive = TRUE)
    fname <- file.path(out.dir, sprintf("%s_%d.png", out.prefix, i))
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = fname, plot = manhplot, width = width / dpi, height = height / dpi, dpi = dpi)

    # also print to current device (optional)
    print(manhplot)
  }

  invisible(TRUE)
}

pconnFunc <- function(path){
  pconn <- cifti::read_cifti(path)
  mat <- pconn$data
  vec <- mat[upper.tri(mat, diag = FALSE)]
  vec
}

ReshapeVectorAsMatrix <- function(dummy_vec,matlength,diagval=1) {
  dummy_emptymat = matrix( data = rep(0,matlength^2),nrow = matlength, ncol = matlength)
  dummy_emptymat[upper.tri(dummy_emptymat,diag = FALSE)] <- dummy_vec
  diag(dummy_emptymat) <- diagval
  dummy_transpose <- t(dummy_emptymat)
  dummy_transpose[upper.tri(dummy_transpose)] <- dummy_vec
  return(dummy_transpose)
}
ReshapeWeightsAsMatrices <- function(weightarray,matlength) {
  weightindex <- 1
  weightlimit <- dim(weightarray)[2]
  weightlist <- vector("list", weightlimit)
  while(weightindex <= weightlimit) {
      weightlist[[weightindex]] <- ReshapeVectorAsMatrix(weightarray[,weightindex],matlength)
      weightindex <- weightindex + 1
  }
  return(weightlist)
}

right_rows <- function (data, times, ids, Q_points) {
    fids <- factor(ids, levels = unique(ids))
    if (!is.list(Q_points))
        Q_points <- split(Q_points, row(Q_points))
    ind <- mapply(findInterval, Q_points, split(times, fids))
    ind[ind < 1] <- 1
    rownams_id <- split(row.names(data), fids)
    ind <- mapply(`[`, rownams_id, split(ind, col(ind)))
    data[c(ind), ]
}

ylmepred <- function (lmeObject, newdata, timeVar, times = NULL, M = 200L, 
  interval = c("confidence", "prediction"), all_times = FALSE, 
  level = 0.95, return_data = FALSE, seed = 1L) 
{
  if (!inherits(lmeObject, "lme") && !inherits(lmeObject, 
    "lmeComponents")) 
    stop("Use only with 'lme' or 'lmeComponents' objects.\n")
  interval <- match.arg(interval)
  if (inherits(lmeObject, "lme")) {
    data <- lmeObject$data
    formYx <- formula(lmeObject)
    mfX <- model.frame(terms(formYx), data = data)
    TermsX <- attr(mfX, "terms")
    formYz <- formula(lmeObject$modelStruct$reStruct[[1]])
    mfZ <- model.frame(terms(formYz), data = data)
    TermsZ <- attr(mfZ, "terms")
    idVar <- names(lmeObject$modelStruct$reStruct)
    betas <- fixef(lmeObject)
    sigma <- lmeObject$sigma
    D <- lapply(pdMatrix(lmeObject$modelStruct$reStruct), 
      "*", sigma^2)[[1]]
    V <- vcov(lmeObject)
    times_orig <- data[[timeVar]]
    times_orig <- times_orig[!is.na(times_orig)]
  }
  else {
    formYx <- lmeObject$formYx
    TermsX <- lmeObject$TermsX
    formYz <- lmeObject$formYz
    TermsZ <- lmeObject$TermsZ
    idVar <- lmeObject$idVar
    betas <- lmeObject$betas
    sigma <- lmeObject$sigma
    D <- lmeObject$D
    V <- lmeObject$V
    times_orig <- lmeObject$times_orig
  }
  all_vars <- unique(c(all.vars(TermsX), all.vars(TermsZ)))
  newdata_nomiss <- newdata[complete.cases(newdata[all_vars]), 
    ]
  mfX_new <- model.frame(TermsX, data = newdata_nomiss)
  X_new <- model.matrix(formYx, mfX_new)
  mfZ_new <- model.frame(TermsZ, data = newdata_nomiss)
  Z_new <- model.matrix(formYz, mfZ_new)
  na_ind <- attr(mfX_new, "na.action")
  y_new <- model.response(mfX_new, "numeric")
  if (length(idVar) > 1) 
    stop("the current version of the function only works with a single grouping variable.\n")
  if (is.null(newdata[[idVar]])) 
    stop("subject id variable not in newdata.")
  id_nomiss <- match(newdata_nomiss[[idVar]], unique(newdata_nomiss[[idVar]]))
  n <- length(unique(id_nomiss))
  modes <- matrix(0, n, ncol(Z_new))
  post_vars <- DZtVinv <- vector("list", n)
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    id_i <- id_nomiss == i
    X_new_id <- X_new[id_i, , drop = FALSE]
    Z_new_id <- Z_new[id_i, , drop = FALSE]
    Vi_inv <- solve(Z_new_id %*% tcrossprod(D, Z_new_id) + 
      sigma^2 * diag(sum(id_i)))
    DZtVinv[[i]] <- tcrossprod(D, Z_new_id) %*% Vi_inv
    modes[i, ] <- c(DZtVinv[[i]] %*% (y_new[id_i] - X_new_id %*% 
      betas))
    t1 <- DZtVinv[[i]] %*% Z_new_id %*% D
    t2 <- DZtVinv[[i]] %*% X_new_id %*% V %*% crossprod(X_new_id, 
      Vi_inv) %*% Z_new_id %*% D
    post_vars[[i]] <- D - t1 + t2
  }
  fitted_y <- c(X_new %*% betas) + rowSums(Z_new * modes[id_nomiss, 
    , drop = FALSE])
  if (is.null(times) || !is.numeric(times)) {
    times <- seq(min(times_orig), max(times_orig), length.out = 100)
  }
  id <- match(newdata[[idVar]], unique(newdata[[idVar]]))
  last_time <- tapply(newdata[[timeVar]], id, max)
  times_to_pred <- lapply(last_time, function(t) if (all_times) 
    times
  else times[times > t])
  id_pred <- rep(seq_len(n), sapply(times_to_pred, length))
  newdata_pred <- right_rows(newdata, newdata[[timeVar]], 
    id, times_to_pred)
  newdata_pred[[timeVar]] <- unlist(times_to_pred)
  mfX_new_pred <- model.frame(TermsX, data = newdata_pred, 
    na.action = NULL)
  X_new_pred <- model.matrix(formYx, mfX_new_pred)
  mfZ_new_pred <- model.frame(TermsZ, data = newdata_pred, 
    na.action = NULL)
  Z_new_pred <- model.matrix(formYz, mfZ_new_pred)
  predicted_y <- c(X_new_pred %*% betas) + rowSums(Z_new_pred * 
    modes[id_pred, , drop = FALSE])
  return(list(fit=fitted_y, pred=predicted_y))
}

```

## Files

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false

## ============================================================
## Get all files from all subject subdirectories
## ============================================================

ROOT <- "/shared/hackathon/abcd/abcc_files/derivatives/abcd-hcp-pipeline_v0.1.4"

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 1. Get subject directories
## ------------------------------------------------------------
subs <- list.dirs(
  path        = ROOT,
  full.names  = TRUE,
  recursive   = FALSE
)

# Keep only directories that start with "sub-"
subs <- subs[grepl("^sub-", basename(subs))]

pconnname <- "task-rest_bold_atlas-Gordon2014FreeSurferSubcortical_desc-filtered_timeseries_thresh-fd0p2mm_censor-10min_conndata-network_connectivity"

cat("Number of subject directories found:", length(subs), "\n")

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 2. Get all files recursively within each subject
## ------------------------------------------------------------
sessions <- list.files(
  path       = subs,
  recursive  = FALSE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Total sessions found:", length(sessions), "\n")

head(sessions)
pconnpattern = paste(pconnname,"\\.pconn\\.nii$",sep="")
pconn_files <- list.files(
  path       = sessions,
  pattern    = pconnpattern,
  recursive  = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Total pconn files found:", length(pconn_files), "\n")

subject_ids <- sub(".*(sub-[^/]+).*", "\\1", pconn_files)
subject_ids_clean <- sub(".*sub-([^_]+)_ses.*", "\\1", subject_ids)

ses_id <- sub(".*_(ses-[^_]+)_.*", "\\1", subject_ids)
head(ses_id)
```

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
ses_00A <- pconn_files[grepl("_ses-00A", basename(pconn_files))]
sub_ids_00A <- sub(".*/sub-([^/]+)/.*", "\\1", ses_00A)
ses_02A <- pconn_files[grepl("_ses-02A", basename(pconn_files))]
sub_ids_02A <- sub(".*/sub-([^/]+)/.*", "\\1", ses_02A)
ses_04A <- pconn_files[grepl("_ses-04A", basename(pconn_files))]
sub_ids_04A <- sub(".*/sub-([^/]+)/.*", "\\1", ses_04A)
ses_06A <- pconn_files[grepl("_ses-06A", basename(pconn_files))]
sub_ids_06A <- sub(".*/sub-([^/]+)/.*", "\\1", ses_06A)

```

```{r}
 common_ids <- Reduce(
   intersect,
   list(sub_ids_00A, sub_ids_02A, sub_ids_04A)
 )

#common_ids <- readRDS("common.RDS")
saveRDS(common_ids,"common.RDS")

length(common_ids)
head(common_ids)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

phenofolder <- "/shared/abcd-6-0-release-tabulated-prod"
phenofile <- paste(phenofolder,"nc_y_nihtb.parquet",sep = "/")
phenos <- read_parquet(phenofile)


# Variables to evaluate
pheno_vars <- setdiff(names(phenos), c("participant_id", "session_id"))

na_table <- phenos %>%
  group_by(session_id) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(pheno_vars),
      ~ sum(!is.na(.)),
      .names = "{.col}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

na_table_t <- na_table %>%
  pivot_longer(
    -session_id,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "n_non_missing"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = session_id,
    values_from = n_non_missing
  )

na_table_t

```

```{r}
#| warning: false

## ============================================================
## UPDATED SOURCE CODE
## - Enforces a single canonical ordering: common_ids
## - Reorders X0/X2/X4 AND p0/p2/p4 to match common_ids
## - Adds strict sanity checks so misalignment can’t slip through
## ============================================================


options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## Helpers -- Organized as Functions above
## ------------------------------------------------------------


## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 1) Build X matrices
## ------------------------------------------------------------
 X0 <- make_X(ses_00A)
 X2 <- make_X(ses_02A)
 X4 <- make_X(ses_04A)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 2) First-pass restrict to your current common_ids
##    (keeps only IDs that appear in the pconn matrices)
## ------------------------------------------------------------
 X0 <- X0[rownames(X0) %in% common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
 X2 <- X2[rownames(X2) %in% common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
 X4 <- X4[rownames(X4) %in% common_ids, , drop = FALSE]
 saveRDS(X0,"X0.RDS")
 saveRDS(X2,"X2.RDS")
 saveRDS(X4,"X4.RDS")
# X0 <- readRDS("X0.RDS")
# X0 <- scale(X0)
# X2 <- readRDS("X2.RDS")
# X2 <- scale(X2)
# X4 <- readRDS("X4.RDS")
# X4 <- scale(X4)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 3) Load example pconn so we know the number of ROIs 
##    (ensures we can accurately retrieve the matrix and visualize)
## ------------------------------------------------------------

nROIs <-  pconnFunc(ses_00A[1],countROIs=TRUE)


## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 4) Load phenos and compute FINAL common_ids intersection
##    (ensures IDs exist in ALL sessions + phenos)
## ------------------------------------------------------------
phenos <- read_parquet(phenofile) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    nc_y_nihtb__picsq__raw_score,
    participant_id,
    session_id
  )

p0 <- make_p(phenos, "ses-00A", common_ids)
p2 <- make_p(phenos, "ses-02A", common_ids)
p4 <- make_p(phenos, "ses-04A", common_ids)

common_ids <- Reduce(
  intersect,
  list(common_ids, p0$id, p2$id, p4$id)
)

cat("[INFO] length(common_ids) =", length(common_ids), "\n")
cat("[INFO] head(common_ids) =", paste(head(common_ids), collapse = ", "), "\n")

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 5) NOW enforce canonical ordering everywhere = common_ids
## ------------------------------------------------------------
# Align X matrices to common_ids order
X0 <- align_rows_to_ids(X0, common_ids)
X2 <- align_rows_to_ids(X2, common_ids)
X4 <- align_rows_to_ids(X4, common_ids)

# Rebuild p0/p2/p4 on FINAL common_ids, then align order
p0 <- make_p(phenos, "ses-00A", common_ids) %>% align_df_to_ids(common_ids)
p2 <- make_p(phenos, "ses-02A", common_ids) %>% align_df_to_ids(common_ids)
p4 <- make_p(phenos, "ses-04A", common_ids) %>% align_df_to_ids(common_ids)

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 5) Final sanity checks + temp table for debugging
## ------------------------------------------------------------
stopifnot(identical(rownames(X0), common_ids))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(X2), common_ids))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(X4), common_ids))
stopifnot(identical(p0$id, common_ids))
stopifnot(identical(p2$id, common_ids))
stopifnot(identical(p4$id, common_ids))

temp <- data.frame(
  rownames_X0 = rownames(X0),
  rownames_X2 = rownames(X2),
  rownames_X4 = rownames(X4),
  common_ids  = common_ids,
  p0_id       = p0$id,
  p2_id       = p2$id,
  p4_id       = p4$id,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat("[INFO] Alignment checks passed. temp rows =", nrow(temp), "\n")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
p0$time <- 0
p2$time <- 2
p4$time <- 4
colnames(p0) <- c("y", "id", "time")
colnames(p2) <- c("y", "id", "time")
colnames(p4) <- c("y", "id", "time")

```

```{r}
#| echo: false

set.seed(123)  # reproducibility

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 1) Get unique IDs
## ------------------------------------------------------------
all_ids <- common_ids

length(all_ids)   # should be 2023

## ------------------------------------------------------------
## 2) Randomly select 1800 IDs for training
## ------------------------------------------------------------
train_ids <- sample(all_ids, size = 1800, replace = FALSE)

## Remaining go to test
test_ids <- setdiff(all_ids, train_ids)

length(train_ids)  # 1800
length(test_ids)   # 223


```

## Singular Value Decomposition

```{r}
#| echo: false


x0train <- X0[rownames(X0) %in% train_ids, , drop = FALSE]
x0test <- X0[!(rownames(X0) %in% train_ids), , drop = FALSE]
xmeans <- colMeans(x0train)
x0train <- t(apply(x0train, 1, function(x) x-xmeans))
x0test <- t(apply(x0test, 1, function(x) x-xmeans))

x2train <- X2[rownames(X2) %in% train_ids, , drop = FALSE]
x2test <- X2[!(rownames(X2) %in% train_ids), , drop = FALSE]
xmeans <- colMeans(x2train)
x2train <- t(apply(x2train, 1, function(x) x-xmeans))
x2test <- t(apply(x2test, 1, function(x) x-xmeans))

x4train <- X4[rownames(X4) %in% train_ids, , drop = FALSE]
x4test <- X4[!(rownames(X4) %in% train_ids), , drop = FALSE]
xmeans <- colMeans(x4train)
x4train <- t(apply(x4train, 1, function(x) x-xmeans))
x4test <- t(apply(x4test, 1, function(x) x-xmeans))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
k <- 10

sv0 <- svds(x0train, k=k, nu=k, nv=k)
pc0train <- x0train %*% as.matrix(sv0$v)
pc0test <- x0test %*% as.matrix(sv0$v)
y0train <- p0 %>% filter(id %in% rownames(pc0train))
colnames(pc0train) <- paste0("pc", 1:k)
y0test <- p0 %>% filter(id %in% rownames(pc0test))
colnames(pc0test) <- paste0("pc", 1:k)

sv2 <- svds(x2train, k=k, nu=k, nv=k)
pc2train <- x2train %*% as.matrix(sv2$v)
pc2test <- x2test %*% as.matrix(sv2$v)
y2train <- p2 %>% filter(id %in% rownames(pc2train))
colnames(pc2train) <- paste0("pc", 1:k)
y2test <- p2 %>% filter(id %in% rownames(pc2test))
colnames(pc2test) <- paste0("pc", 1:k)

sv4 <- svds(x4train, k=k, nu=k, nv=k)
pc4train <- x4train %*% as.matrix(sv4$v)
pc4test <- x4test %*% as.matrix(sv4$v)
y4train <- p4 %>% filter(id %in% rownames(pc4train))
colnames(pc4train) <- paste0("pc", 1:k)
y4test <- p4 %>% filter(id %in% rownames(pc4test))
colnames(pc4test) <- paste0("pc", 1:k)

ztrain <- rbind(pc0train, pc2train, pc4train)
ytrain <- rbind(y0train,y2train,y4train)
data_train <- data.frame(ytrain, ztrain)

ztest <- rbind(pc0test, pc2test, pc4test)
ytest <- rbind(y0test,y2test,y4test)
data_test <- data.frame(ytest, ztest)

str(sv0)
str(sv2)
str(sv4)

```

## Linear Mixed Effects Models

```{r}
#| echo: false



```

```{r}
mf_vars <- c("y", "id", "time", paste0("pc", 1:10))

bad_counts <- sapply(data_train[, mf_vars, drop = FALSE], function(x) {
  if (is.numeric(x)) sum(!is.finite(x)) else sum(is.na(x))
})

bad_counts


```

```{r}
model_1 <- nlme::lme(
  fixed  = y ~ pc1 + pc2 + pc3 + pc4 + pc5 + pc6 + pc7 + pc8 + pc9 + pc10 + time*pc1,
  random = ~ 1 | id,
  data   = data_train,
  method = "REML",
  na.action = na.omit
)

output <- ylmepred(model_1, data_test, timeVar = "time", times = c(0,2,4), all_times = TRUE, seed = 1L)

```

```{r}

nm <- names(output$fit)

df_ids <- data.frame(
  key  = nm,  # <-- keep original key
  ID   = sub("\\..*$", "", nm),
  time = ifelse(grepl("\\.", nm), sub("^.*\\.", "", nm), NA_character_),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

df_ids$time <- as.integer(df_ids$time)
df_ids$time <- ifelse(is.na(df_ids$time), 0L, df_ids$time * 2L)

# map yhat by key (order-proof)
df_ids$yhat <- unname(output$fit[df_ids$key])

# optional
df_ids$key <- NULL
```

```{r}
results <- data_test %>%
  mutate(ID = id,
         time = as.integer(time),
         y=y) %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, time, y) %>%
  inner_join(., df_ids, by=c("ID", "time"))
```

## Correlations between Predicted and Observed

```{r}
r0 <- results %>% filter(time == 0)
cor(r0$y, r0$yhat)
r2 <- results %>% filter(time == 2)
cor(r2$y, r2$yhat)
r4 <- results %>% filter(time == 4)
cor(r4$y, r4$yhat)
```

## Plots

```{r}

ggplot(r0, aes(x = y, y = yhat)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "polygon",
    alpha = 0.4,
    contour = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", guide = "none") +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +

  geom_abline(
    slope = 1, intercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  coord_equal() +

  labs(
    x = "Observed (y)",
    y = "Predicted (yhat)",
    title = "Observed vs Predicted",
    subtitle = "Red dashed line = 45° reference"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

```{r}

ggplot(r2, aes(x = y, y = yhat)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "polygon",
    alpha = 0.4,
    contour = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", guide = "none") +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +

  geom_abline(
    slope = 1, intercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  coord_equal() +

  labs(
    x = "Observed (y)",
    y = "Predicted (yhat)",
    title = "Observed vs Predicted",
    subtitle = "Red dashed line = 45° reference"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

```{r}

ggplot(r4, aes(x = y, y = yhat)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "polygon",
    alpha = 0.4,
    contour = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C", guide = "none") +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +

  geom_abline(
    slope = 1, intercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  coord_equal() +

  labs(
    x = "Observed (y)",
    y = "Predicted (yhat)",
    title = "Observed vs Predicted",
    subtitle = "Red dashed line = 45° reference"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

## Heatmap Visualizations

```{r}
## Heatmap visualizations

# loading R data containing ROI indices to determine ROI order
load("~/ROI.RData")
ROIindex <- unique(ROI$roi1)
ROIcomm <- sapply( ROIindex ,function(x) {ROI$com1[ROI$roi1==x][1]} )
ROIdf <- data.frame(index = ROIindex, comm = ROIcomm)
ROIdf_cortical <- ROIdf[1:333,]
ROIdf_cortical_ordered <- ROIdf_cortical[order(ROIdf_cortical$comm),]
ROIdf_cortical_ordered$old_index <- ROIdf_cortical_ordered$index
ROIdf_cortical_ordered$index <- 1:333

#load community file to define grid lines and set organization
Gordoncommfile <- "~/gordon_communities_plus_subcortical.csv"
Gordoncomms <- read.csv(Gordoncommfile)

```

```{r}
## reshape weight vectors back into appropriate matrices
sv0weightmatlist <- ReshapeWeightsAsMatrices(sv0$v,nROIs)
sv2weightmatlist <- ReshapeWeightsAsMatrices(sv2$v,nROIs)
sv4weightmatlist <- ReshapeWeightsAsMatrices(sv4$v,nROIs)
```

```{r}
#heatmap visualizations 
FCMap(sv0weightmatlist[[1]],plottitle="first PC baseline",negmax=-0.03,posmax=0.03,comms_df = Gordoncomms)
FCMap(sv2weightmatlist[[1]],plottitle="first PC year 2",negmax=-0.03,posmax=0.03,comms_df = Gordoncomms)
FCMap(sv4weightmatlist[[1]],plottitle="first PC year 4",negmax=-0.03,posmax=0.03,comms_df = Gordoncomms)

```

## Manhattan Plot

```{r}

X <- as.matrix(X0)              # n x p
y <- as.numeric(p0$y)           # length n

fit <- plsr(y ~ X, ncomp = 20,  # choose a max; tune later
            scale = FALSE, center = TRUE,
            validation = "CV",
            method = "kernelpls")
```

```{r}
v1 <- fit$loading.weights[, 1]
```

```{r}
load("ROI.RData")
# Define the inputs ManPlot expects
group_structure <- ROI$group
optional_index  <- ROI$index

# Optional: predictor names (use ROI$roi if it matches your predictors)
# Otherwise keep colnames(X)
predictor_names <- if (!is.null(ROI$roi)) ROI$roi else colnames(X)

# Sanity checks (these must match p = number of predictors)
stopifnot(length(group_structure) == length(predictor_names))
stopifnot(length(optional_index)  == length(predictor_names))
stopifnot(length(v1)              == length(predictor_names))

# Plot the first PLS "eigenvector" (loading weight vector)
ManPlot(
  V = v1,
  predictor.names = predictor_names,
  group.structure = group_structure,
  optional.index = optional_index,
  man.thresh = 0,
  point.size = 1.5
)
```
